description.value:
You recite an excerpt of the Laws of Mortality, often the first law: "Let no mortal be beholden to a god." Attempt an @Check[intimidation|against:will] check against all enemies within 60 feet that worship a deity, comparing your result against each target's Will DC. Targets are then temporarily immune to your use of this ability for 24 hours.

Critical Success The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}. Until the start of your next turn, if the target attempts to Cast a Spell with the divine trait, it must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:7] or the action is lost.

Success As critical success, but @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1}, and the DC of the flat check is 5.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Edict of Mortality]
